title: erysimum ochroleucum
intro: Erysimum ochroleucum, also known as the cream marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of western China. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The cream marigold offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, and treating conditions such as eczema and acne. Erysimum ochroleucum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
